commit.message:
fix(backend): switch base image Alpine→Debian bookworm-slim

Alpine uses musl libc; packages like orjson, vtracer, cryptography only
ship manylinux (glibc) wheels and cannot install on Alpine without the
full Rust toolchain, causing uv sync to fail with exit code 1.

Changes:
- Base image: ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:python3.11-alpine → bookworm-slim
- Replace apk with apt-get + Debian equivalents
- Add libpq-dev for psycopg[binary]
- Remove --quiet from uv sync to surface errors in build logs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix term description lookup failing on first call due to ergm cache init (#11)

* Initial plan

* Fix term description lookup failing on first call due to ergm cache init

The first call to ergm::search.ergmTerms() can fail when the ergm term
cache is being initialized (e.g. when the package is loaded via
devtools::load_all()). This caused the tryCatch to catch the cache
error and return NA for the first term's description.

Fix: add a retry in .lookup_single_term() so the cache init error is
absorbed on the first attempt and the actual lookup succeeds on retry.

Also re-render README.md so it shows correct descriptions.

Co-authored-by: gvegayon <893619+gvegayon@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix British spelling 'initialised' to 'initialized' in comment

Co-authored-by: gvegayon <893619+gvegayon@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: gvegayon <893619+gvegayon@users.noreply.github.com>

ao usar endpoints da API (ex: capturar foto pelo leitor) via domínio público.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: corrige mapeamento UUID no Push Mode e captura remota de foto

- PushModeController: mapeia device_uuid→cmd_uuid quando entrega comando
  no /push, resolve no /result antes de processar (device ignora uuid
  da resposta e usa o próprio uuid na chamada /result)
- ControlIdService: adiciona import faltante de PushCommand
- SecurityConfig: corrige ordem de addFilterBefore para JwtAuthenticationFilter
  (filtro precisa estar registrado antes de ser usado como âncora)
- application-docker.yml: baseline-on-migrate + validate-on-migrate=false
  para compatibilidade com banco já existente

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: replace default favicon and shorten SEO title (#1)

* fix: replace default favicon and shorten SEO title

- Replace the default Next.js favicon.ico (16x16, 781 bytes) with a
  proper multi-size ICO (16/32/48px, 5263 bytes) generated from the
  custom apple-icon.png. Fixes wrong icon showing in Google search.

- Shorten default page title from ~70 chars to ~52 chars by removing
  the location suffix. Prevents awkward mid-word truncation in Google
  search results. Location info is still in the description and
  structured data.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: redirect www.drmayatorem.com to non-www primary domain

Simplify the middleware condition to redirect ALL non-canonical hosts
(including www) to drmayatorem.com with a 301. Previously www was
explicitly allowed through, serving duplicate content.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: add settings command to enforce repo settings across fleet (#1)

Add a new 'settings' command that enforces consistent repo settings:
- Disables wikis
- Enables auto-delete of head branches on merge
- Allows only squash merge (disables merge commit and rebase merge)

The command discovers all fleet repos, checks their current settings
concurrently, and applies updates to any repos that are out of compliance.
Supports --dry-run to preview changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

controlid: enqueue remote_enroll for Push Mode devices in capturarFotoPeloDispositivo()
